topics.title: Action data.json schema
topics.description: Use when authoring data.json: qkrpc.program-data.v1 JSON schema + steps[]/variables[] wire rules (bind, branching, defaults). guide get --json returns schema.
topics.allowedTools: qkrpc_guide_get qkrpc_step_runner_get qkrpc_step_runner_search qkrpc_action_create workspace_action_read_data workspace_action_write_data workspace_action_edit_data workspace_action_file_read workspace_action_file_write workspace_action_file_edit qkrpc_action_patch

topics.title: Embedded subprograms
topics.description: subprograms/{subId}/ disk model; root data.json without inline subPrograms[]. Use when editing embedded subprograms.

topics.title: Action icons
topics.description: Font Awesome fa: spec and http(s) image URLs for metadata and context menus. Use before set-metadata or guessing fa:Light_* names.

topics.title: Action organization
topics.description: Use when tidying action pages: list/search (uses: refs), move, global tab create/reorder, virtual process ensure — not for editing steps.
topics.allowedTools: qkrpc_action_list qkrpc_action_search qkrpc_action_move qkrpc_profile_create qkrpc_profile_reorder qkrpc_process_ensure

topics.title: Workspace project layout
topics.description: .quicker/actions/{actionId} tree, data.json, files/ external {file} refs. Use when authoring file refs on disk.

topics.title: Action publish workflow
topics.description: Use when sharing or updating getquicker actions: first publish vs changelog update, metadata/icon rules. HTML 动作说明 is built-in automation — Agent stops at Pub4.
topics.allowedTools: qkrpc_action_get qkrpc_action_set_metadata qkrpc_action_publish qkrpc_action_debug qkrpc_fa_search docs

topics.title: Action authoring workflow
topics.description: P1–P7 main action editing flow. Use before the first action edit in a session.
topics.allowedTools: qkrpc_action_create qkrpc_action_list qkrpc_action_search qkrpc_action_get qkrpc_action_patch qkrpc_action_set_metadata qkrpc_step_runner_get qkrpc_step_runner_search workspace_action_projects workspace_action_read_data workspace_action_write_data workspace_action_edit_data workspace_action_file_read workspace_action_file_write workspace_action_file_edit

topics.title: Context menu item syntax
topics.description: CommonOperationItem multi-line text: ContextMenuData, [icon]title(hint)|data, submenus, quicker_in_param. Use when editing context menus.
topics.allowedTools: qkrpc_action_get qkrpc_action_set_metadata qkrpc_action_patch qkrpc_fa_search workspace_action_read_data workspace_action_edit_data

topics.title: Expressions & interpolation
topics.description: P4 default: $=, $$, sys:evalexpression (LINQ/string/JSON/multi-assign). Prefer before sys:csscript.

topics.title: Form spec
topics.description: Use when authoring sys:form: formDef.file + files/*.form.json (qkrpc.form.v1). guide get --json returns qkrpc.form-spec.v1 schema.
topics.allowedTools: qkrpc_guide_get qkrpc_form_validate qkrpc_form_build qkrpc_step_runner_get workspace_action_edit_data workspace_action_file_write qkrpc_action_patch

topics.title: Implementation fallback
topics.description: P4 fallback: expressions/evalexpression first, then sys:csscript vs runScript. Use when no dedicated module fits.

topics.title: Overview
topics.description: Headless action editing overview: doc layers, P0–P7 index, topic routing. Use when starting action editing or choosing which guide to read.

topics.title: Open Quicker UI
topics.description: Open Quicker settings pages and windows (recycle bin, general settings, search box, process scene). Use when the user asks to open a Quicker UI page/window.

topics.title: Step modules reference
topics.description: Condensed step module catalog by category. Use after step-runner search, with step_runner_get; docs_get_reference topic step-modules.

topics.title: Step-runner schema (get)
topics.description: Agent/CLI step-runner get: compressed schema vs search; forbid get-ui. Use after search, before writing inputParams.

topics.title: Step-runner search
topics.description: Catalog search syntax (OR, wildcards, sys:*). Use when finding step module key before step_runner_get.

topics.title: Subprograms
topics.description: Global vs embedded subprograms and call workflow. Use when adding subprogram steps or editing subprogram projects.

topics.title: WebView2 authoring
topics.description: sys:webview2: external files/*.html, virtualHostToFolder; agent browser preview. Use before patch.
topics.allowedTools: qkrpc_step_runner_get qkrpc_step_runner_search workspace_action_read_data workspace_action_write_data workspace_action_edit_data workspace_action_file_read workspace_action_file_write workspace_action_file_edit workspace_action_patch browser qkrpc_action debug

topics.title: Workspace editing
topics.description: .quicker/actions layout; workspace_action_*_data and workspace_action_file_*; patch saves. Use when editing on disk.
topics.allowedTools: qkrpc_action_get qkrpc_action_patch workspace_action_projects workspace_action_read_data workspace_action_write_data workspace_action_edit_data workspace_action_file_read workspace_action_file_write workspace_action_file_edit
topics.compatibility: QuickerAgent; requires working directory in sidebar
